etymology.description: 畱(畱) (liú, "to stay") originates as phonetic 丣(丣) + semantic 田(田) ("field") -> final form 留(留)
etymology.interpretation: In its original form 畱(畱), the combination of 田(田) ("field") suggests a location or nature, while 丣(丣) adds the phonetic "liú" component. The idea of staying in one place is connected to the field as a fixed location.

examples.chinese: 我明天不走(我明天不走)，我要留在这里(我要留在這裡)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ míngtiān bù zǒu, wǒ yào liú zài zhèlǐ.
examples.english: I'm not leaving tomorrow, I want to stay here.

examples.chinese: 请你留下来帮我(請你留下來幫我)。
examples.pinyin: Qǐng nǐ liú xià lái bāng wǒ.

examples.chinese: 他决定留在家乡发展(他決定留在家鄉發展)。
examples.pinyin: Tā juédìng liú zài jiāxiāng fāzhǎn.
examples.english: He decided to stay in his hometown to develop.
